name: Texas Longhorn Touchdown Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-4 quart pan over low heat, stir butter with cocoa until melted.
2. Turn off the heat. Beat in sugar.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
4. Add flour, pecans, and chocolate; mix well.
5. Spread batter in a buttered 9x13 inch pan.
6. Bake in an oven set to 325°F until the top feels dry in the center, about 35 minutes.
7. Cool in the pan. If baking ahead, wrap airtight when cool and hold up to a day.
8. Cut into 12 to 16 pieces.
